data.title: ezW2 2025 Enterprise by Halfpricesoft.com simplifies e-filing, reduces tax season stress, and is popular among accountants and SMBs.
data.description: In REDMOND, Wash., as of December 5, 2025, Halfpricesoft.com remains a top provider for tax form processing, particularly among accountants and small to medium-sized businesses. Users favor the ezW2 2025 enterprise version for its wide array of advanced functionalities. Recently, the company launched an updated enterprise edition, solidifying its position in the market.

data.title: IBM is designated as a critical third-party provider under EU DORA regulation for financial entities to maintain operational resilience.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in Armonk, New York, the Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA) was introduced. This new legislation from the European Union aims to safeguard financial institutions like banks, insurance companies, and investment firms, as well as their crucial Information and Communication Technology (ICT) systems. The regulation intends to promote a resilient digital infrastructure, ensuring the continuity and security of financial services. By establishing stringent requirements for operational resilience, DORA seeks to mitigate risks and enhance the stability of the financial sector in the face of increasing technological complexities.

data.title: Prof. Gang Shen's research on Mandibular Advancement Repositioning in the Journal of Aligner Orthodontics.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, a study led by Professor Gang Shen's Orthodontic Team at Taikang Bybo Dental in Shanghai was released in the Journal of Aligner Orthodontics (JAO). The research focuses on the effectiveness of Mandibular Advancement and offers crucial insights.

data.title: After 15 years, grid battery prices have dropped, making them more common worldwide for improved grid reliability.
data.description: Fifteen years ago, a pioneering grid battery system was deployed in the Atacama Desert in Chile. Since then, the cost of these batteries has significantly decreased, leading to their growing adoption globally.

data.title: MEXC reports 1,329% peak return for top new tokens in November, focusing on utility sectors, leading BSC ecosystem. Launchpad campaign sees 125% returns and Airdrop+ program distributes 2 million USDT to 6,551 participants. Trading volume and price performance correlation reaches 80%.
data.description: MEXC, a leading cryptocurrency exchange, reported a rise in user activity across utility-driven market sectors, showcasing alignment between trading volume and price performance. The top 10 new tokens saw an average peak gain of 1,329%, driven by utility tokens in DeFi (30%), infrastructure (40%), and decentralized AI (20%). The BSC ecosystem led November returns, with a 40% share of top-performing tokens. Trading volume and price performance correlation hit 80% in 2025, indicating a more rational market structure. MEXC Launchpad users enjoyed up to 125% returns with the MON launchpad campaign, while the Airdrop+ program distributed over 2 million USDT to 6,551 participants. This highlights MEXC's role in providing early access to high-growth opportunities and bridging the gap between emerging trends and tradability.

data.title: Apple appoints Meta's Jennifer Newstead as General Counsel and SVP, to succeed Kate Adams. Apple's Lisa Jackson to retire.
data.description: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) has named Jennifer Newstead, the current chief legal officer of Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META), as their new general counsel and senior vice president. Newstead, who previously served as the legal advisor of the U.S. Department of State, will start her role next month and officially become general counsel in March. She will be taking over from Kate Adams, who has held the position of general counsel at Apple since 2017 and is expected to retire next year after a transition period. Lisa Jackson, Apple's Vice President for Environment, Policy, and Social Initiatives, will also be retiring in late January. Upon her departure, the government affairs team at Apple, part of the environment, policy, and social division, will experience changes.

data.title: SciBase Holding AB had an extraordinary general meeting where resolutions were made as per the proposal.
data.description: An extraordinary general meeting took place in SciBase Holding AB (publ) in Stockholm on Dec. 5, 2025. The meeting resulted in a resolution in line with the proposed agenda. The details of the proposal can be found in the meeting notice.

data.title: HKUST and SEMI co-hosted 2025 Semiconductor Innovation Summit in Hong Kong on Dec 5, aiming to drive industry growth.
data.description: Bringing together leading figures in the semiconductor industry with a focus on driving innovation and growth, the first-ever 2025 Semiconductor Innovation and Intelligent Application Summit was recently completed in Hong Kong. Organized by the Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST) in partnership with SEMI, the event aimed to foster collaboration and development within the sector. Held on December 5, 2025, the summit showcased the latest advancements and trends in semiconductor technology, attracting a significant audience.

data.title: Former UN Under Secretary General Pino Arlacchi explores Hehe Culture in Taizhou City, Zhejiang Province during 2025 Forum.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in Beijing, Mr. Pino Arlacchi, a former Under Secretary-general of the United Nations and senior advisor of Eu-Asia Centre, conducted a visit to Tiantai County in Taizhou City, Zhejiang Province as part of the 2025 Hehe Culture Forum. This visit marked the beginning of his study into Hehe Culture during this event.
